creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On 2012-03-14 03:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of deskutils/calibre,
>
> Please note that PR ports/166069 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166069

Here's a patch that I've tested and confirmed it works to upgrade to 
0.8.42.  For the record, I can't keep up with the release cycle of 
calibe so I try to grab about every other release they do, as this 
includes.

Rusty Nejdl
